'''ngorangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolflike|wolflike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolflike|wolflike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngorangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngorangithi|ngorangithi]] || [[word:ngorangiji|ngorangiji]] || [[word:ngorangishi|ngorangishi]] || [[word:ngorangiki|ngorangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoranguthuthu|ngoranguthuthu]] || [[word:ngorangujuju|ngorangujuju]] || [[word:ngorangushushu|ngorangushushu]] || [[word:ngorangukuku|ngorangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoranguthu|ngoranguthu]] || [[word:ngoranguju|ngoranguju]] || [[word:ngorangushu|ngorangushu]] || [[word:ngoranguku|ngoranguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngorangufthuf|ngorangufthuf]] || [[word:ngorangufjuf|ngorangufjuf]] || [[word:ngorangufshuf|ngorangufshuf]] || [[word:ngorangufkuf|ngorangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngorangethe|ngorangethe]] || [[word:ngorangeje|ngorangeje]] || [[word:ngorangeshe|ngorangeshe]] || [[word:ngorangeke|ngorangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngorangothotho|ngorangothotho]] || [[word:ngorangojojo|ngorangojojo]] || [[word:ngorangoshosho|ngorangoshosho]] || [[word:ngorangokoko|ngorangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngorangotho|ngorangotho]] || [[word:ngorangojo|ngorangojo]] || [[word:ngorangosho|ngorangosho]] || [[word:ngorangoko|ngorangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngorangofthof|ngorangofthof]] || [[word:ngorangofjof|ngorangofjof]] || [[word:ngorangofshof|ngorangofshof]] || [[word:ngorangofkof|ngorangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngorangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngorangĂŠthĂŠ|ngorangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngorangĂŠjĂŠ|ngorangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngorangĂŠshĂŠ|ngorangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngorangĂŠkĂŠ|ngorangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngorangathatha|ngorangathatha]] || [[word:ngorangajaja|ngorangajaja]] || [[word:ngorangashasha|ngorangashasha]] || [[word:ngorangakaka|ngorangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngorangatha|ngorangatha]] || [[word:ngorangaja|ngorangaja]] || [[word:ngorangasha|ngorangasha]] || [[word:ngorangaka|ngorangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngorangafthaf|ngorangafthaf]] || [[word:ngorangafjaf|ngorangafjaf]] || [[word:ngorangafshaf|ngorangafshaf]] || [[word:ngorangafkaf|ngorangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngorangasha|ngorangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngorangshĂ«sha|ngorangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngorangrosha|ngorangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngorangmusha|ngorangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngorangyasha|ngorangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongorangnkshĂ«sha|gongorangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongorangnkrosha|gongorangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongorangnkmusha|gongorangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongorangnkyasha|gongorangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngorarangasha|ngorarangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngorarangshĂ«sha|ngorarangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngorarangrosha|ngorarangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngorarangmusha|ngorarangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngorarangyasha|ngorarangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongorarangnkshĂ«sha|gongorarangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongorarangnkrosha|gongorarangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongorarangnkmusha|gongorarangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongorarangnkyasha|gongorarangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngerĂŠngasha|ngerĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngerĂŠngshĂ«sha|ngerĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngerĂŠngrosha|ngerĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngerĂŠngmusha|ngerĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngerĂŠngyasha|ngerĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongerĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gongerĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongerĂŠngnkrosha|gongerĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongerĂŠngnkmusha|gongerĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongerĂŠngnkyasha|gongerĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngorfangasha|ngorfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngorfangshĂ«sha|ngorfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngorfangrosha|ngorfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngorfangmusha|ngorfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngorfangyasha|ngorfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongorfangnkshĂ«sha|gongorfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongorfangnkrosha|gongorfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongorfangnkmusha|gongorfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongorfangnkyasha|gongorfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
